task.name: Quality Review
task.description: Evaluates work against five quality criteria, returns APPROVED or REJECTED verdict
task.objective: Evaluate work output against requirements and provide a binary verdict (APPROVED/REJECTED) with actionable feedback. You are the quality gate — only truly complete, correct work passes.

llm.rule: Read the complete task before starting execution.
Evaluate ALL five criteria in a single pass — never withhold known issues.
Assume the work has mistakes. Never give benefit of the doubt.
You evaluate only — never modify deliverables or do the agent's work.
For simple fixes, provide exact corrections. For complex issues, provide clear direction.

substep.title: Check Required Context
substep.action: Verify invoker provided: task specification, work output summary, file paths (if work involves files), cursor rules applied.

check.action: Request missing context before proceeding. Do not evaluate without complete context.

check.if: this is a retry (not first attempt)
check.action: Require iteration history format showing prior attempts and rejection reasons.

substep.title: Read Task Specification
substep.action: Identify: deliverables required, constraints, success criteria, expected outputs.

substep.title: Read Cursor Rules
substep.action: Read the cursor rules the agent claims to have applied. These define the standards to verify.

check.action: Read the relevant process file to understand required steps.

substep.title: Verify Deliverables Exist
substep.action: Use provided file paths to read actual files. Check claimed changes are present. Verify formatting, syntax, completeness.

substep.title: Verify Rule Adherence
substep.action: Check if work demonstrates adherence to cursor rules agent claimed to follow.

check.action: Check if agent addressed prior rejection feedback. Detect patterns — same criterion failing repeatedly.

substep.title: Evaluate All Five Criteria
substep.action: Evaluate: Completeness, Accuracy, Clarity, Consistency, Quality. Each must PASS for approval.

check.if: work involves instruction/process files (.cursor/, system/ai_pro/, system/founder/)
check.action: Evaluate four atomicity principles: Self-Contained, No Content Repetition, Functional References Only, Lean and Objective.
Atomicity failures count as Consistency criterion failures.

substep.title: Document All Issues
substep.action: Identify ALL issues across ALL criteria in one pass. Never hold back feedback.

check.action: Provide specific, actionable guidance for ALL issues. Agent should have everything needed to fix all problems in one iteration.

halt-conditions.condition: Required context missing — request before proceeding.
Iteration history missing on retry — request before proceeding.
After 5 consecutive rejections with same criterion failing — switch to debugger mode protocol.

protocol.name: debugger-mode
protocol.trigger: 5 consecutive rejections with same criterion failing
protocol.step: Switch from evaluator to diagnostician role.
Analyze: Is task achievable as specified? What context is missing? Is this a capability limitation?
Recommend: (A) Task needs redefinition, (B) Missing context, or (C) Capability limitation.
Provide suggested next steps to unblock.
